# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Use Python 3.12+.
Follow PEP8.
Use type hints everywhere.
Use Google-style docstrings.
Prefer dataclasses where appropriate.
Never use print(); use logging.
Validate all public inputs.
Raise custom exceptions.
Write pytest unit tests for new functionality.
Target >90% coverage.
Prefer readability over cleverness.
Keep business logic separate from utilities.
Avoid duplicate code.
Use pathlib instead of os.path.
Use f-strings.
Explain non-obvious logic with comments.
Never hardcode secrets.
